landing.title: Store Your Valuables Safely
landing.description: Modern, secure, and reliable Safe Deposit Box service for all generations.

features.security_desc: Multi-layered system with restricted access and 24/7 surveillance.
features.access_desc: Access your valuables anytime during bank operational hours.
features.ease_desc: Fast and practical digital registration for all ages.

customer_form.confirmation: I confirm that the entered data is correct.

validation.name_min: Full name must be at least 3 characters
validation.address_min: Address must be at least 10 characters
validation.account_mandiri_len: Mandiri account number must be 13 digits
validation.signature_required: Direct signature is required and must be saved
validation.agreed_required: You must agree to the terms and conditions

box_sizes.title: Choose Box Size
box_sizes.subtitle: Choose the size that best suits your needs
box_sizes.box_size_30_desc: Small Size - Perfect for documents and small jewelry.
box_sizes.box_size_40_desc: Medium Size - Suitable for valuable collections and important documents.
box_sizes.box_size_50_desc: Large Size - Suitable for larger valuables.

status.title: Check Application Status
status.subtitle: Track the progress of your Safe Deposit Box application
status.not_found: Application not found. Please check your tracking code.
status.description_pending: Your application is currently being verified by our admin. Please be patient.
status.description_active: Your application has been approved. Please visit the nearest bank branch for physical activation.
status.description_rejected: We apologize, your application could not be approved.
status.description_expired: Your Safe Deposit Box rental period has expired.

success.title: Application Submitted!
success.subtitle: Thank you for applying for a Safe Deposit Box. Please save your tracking code below.
success.save_code_hint: Please save this code to check your application status later.
success.next_step_1: Admin will review your documents within 1-3 business days.
success.next_step_2: You can check your application status anytime using the tracking code above.
success.next_step_3: We will send an email notification if your application is approved.

apply.title: New Application
apply.subtitle: Complete {{count}} easy steps to secure your assets
apply.review_subtitle: Review your data once more before submitting

upload.subtitle: Ensure documents are clearly visible and not blurry

signature.title: Digital Signature
signature.subtitle: Sign inside the box below using your finger or stylus.
signature.success_msg: Signature saved successfully. Proceed to the next step.
signature.tip_1: Use finger or stylus to sign
signature.tip_3: Click "Redo" if you want to repeat

footer.branch: Jakarta Pondok Indah Metro Branch Office
footer.description: Valuables and securities deposit service designed specifically for your comfort and security.
footer.note: *Following Bank Indonesia working days & National Holidays
footer.copyright: PT Bank Mandiri (Persero) Tbk. Registered and supervised by OJK.
footer.address: Jl. Metro Pondok Indah, RT.1/RW.16, Pd. Pinang, Kby. Lama, South Jakarta City, Jakarta 12310
